name: pathway-enrichment
tagline: Runs and interprets pathway/gene-set enrichment (ORA/GSEA/ssGSEA) on gene lists via gseapy, g:Profiler, Enrichr, MSigDB, GO, KEGG, Reactome.
verdict: Clean bioinformatics workflow skill. Installs only well-known PyPI packages (gseapy, gprofiler-official), openly discloses the network access it needs (Enrichr/g:Profiler/MSigDB lookups) as part of its stated purpose, has no secret access, no destructive operations, and no hidden or manipulative instructions. Solid step-by-step guidance, pitfalls list, and r
